productDisplayName: Ant Kids Girl Cheerful Green Tops
description: CompositionLight green top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck and mildly puffed short sleeves with green piping along the neckline and sleeve hems, ruffles on the chest and graphic print with bead detailing on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron This pretty top from ant is a true flowery treat and a great casual wear for your little girl. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this top is sure to become her wardrobe favoutite. Team it with denim skirts or skorts.
